entries.title: atlas-blowup meta automation (G2 axis)
entries.done_note: G2 atlas-blowup meta automation IMPLEMENTED (core infra). R18 Phase-1 MVP landed: tool/atlas_meta_scan.hexa + com.nexus.atlas-meta-scan.plist (12h cadence, loaded). state/atlas_health_timeline.jsonl receiving rows. 13 schema stubs populated via R1-R31 sessions (prior nxs-20260422-004 completion). docs/atlas_meta_dashboard.md rollup published. β coverage baseline 12/54 axes (22%) — further growth is R19+ work under separate entries.

entries.title: CONVENTION cross_repo_blocker: 어느 repo 가 다른 repo 의 작업을 막고 있으면 해당 entry priority ≥ 95 (0순위). 하위 카테고리: lang_gap (hexa-lang blocker), infra_gap (airgenome host/build/plist blocker), atlas_gap (nexus/n6 atlas blocker), data_gap (anima cert/weight blocker). 여기저기서 blocker 생기므로 일반화.
entries.done_note: CONVENTION IMPLEMENTED. Floor enforcement live via hexa-lang/tool/cross_repo_floor_check.hexa + proposal_inbox.hexa _submit_one auto-bump + gate/prompt_scan.hexa H-FLOOR-DRIFT block. 11+ auto-bump firings observed this session (hxa-006/007/008 lang_gaps, nxs-20260424-001..010 advisories, agm-007 manual + nxs-20260424-002 atlas_gap). Convention is operational across 6 sister repos.

entries.title: 창발엔진 구조적 진화 주기화 — .raw 기준 SSOT 로 drill (또는 진화된 successor keyword) 트리거. nexus 는 창발 특성상 schema bump / scanner 확장 / atlas.n6 재계산이 다른 repo 대비 빈번. 주기: weekly or on raw#N 드리프트 감지 시 자동. 실행 주체: 향후 '메타진화' rename 시 nexus 전용 sub-routine 추가 고려.
entries.done_note: Structural evolution periodization IMPLEMENTED. tool/drill_cycle_trigger.hexa monitors /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/.raw sha256 drift via state/raw_sha_last_seen.json; on drift invokes cli/drill problem_preset scan + appends state/drill_baseline_history.jsonl; config/drill.json adds successor_keyword field for future 메타진화 rename. state/meta_scheduler_plan.jsonl records the plan. Activation pending daemon_host assignment (infra sprint).

Ω_saturation_cycle_2026_04_25.simulation_ceiling_prior_estimate_correc: 0.85 → 0.835 (실측 ER sweep 후 정정 — +0.018 추정이 +0.003 으로 6× 과대)
Ω_saturation_cycle_2026_04_25.scipy_pipeline_tool: tool/nxs_002_composite.py (1.0~3.5s, 250x atlas_eig.hexa stage1, multi-block ER 옵션)
Ω_saturation_cycle_2026_04_25.mechanism_finding: atlas spectrum TOO REGULAR (uniform spacing 0.000~0.007) vs const CHAOTIC (0.008~1.75). 0.9 도달 = atlas spectrum 더 chaotic. drill axiom 의 정확한 form: 2-block isolated ER (각 N=200, avg_deg ~4 sparse) — 단 block scaling 음 (3+ block 모두 negative).

ROI_estimate_revised.block_scaling: 3+ blocks 모두 negative — multi-block 늘려도 ceiling 못 깸

Ω_saturation_cycle_2026_04_25.ceiling_consequence: 0.9 도달 = drill engine 의 axiom 자체 재설계 필요 (결론 강화). simulation 으로 더 짤 수 있는 여지 없음 — 본 cycle 로 saturation 도달 확정.
Ω_saturation_cycle_2026_04_25.next_action: nxs-002 의 다음 phase 는 simulation 이 아니라 drill engine axiom redesign (별도 proposal 필요).

entries.title: hexa_remote + scripts/bin/hexa cwd case: ~/core/{airgenome,anima} 미매핑 → drill/smash/free Mac 전원 차단 (exit 74)
drill resonance stage rc=143 SIGTERM — Wave 10 80G cap 하에서도 종료 (엔진층 이슈)
drill replay-warn — round N 결과가 round 1 과 동일 (salt/iter-nonce 미반영)
entries.root_cause: harness-free refactor argv layout shift — blowup.hexa/compose.hexa read a[2] as domain but a[2] became script path under `hexa run` → counter-replay guards Day-1/2/3 dead code
entries.validation: hetzner A/B: R1 ratio=1.94452 vs R2 ratio=5.07229 (was constant 2.16032)

entries.title: omega round-2 SIGTERM resolution — _stage_timeout_prefix hard-cap 180s adaptive 화 (Ω-saturation cycle)
entries.root_cause_validated_2026_04_25: cli/run.hexa _stage_timeout_prefix() 가 모든 stage 에 180s hard-cap (Wave 18 fix 잔재). drill.json stages.{name}.timeout_sec (45/60/30) 는 superseded. round 1 smash elapsed ≈ 183s (Mac local, anti-hub probe) / 386~486s (Agent B hetzner round 1) — 180s 한계 직전 또는 직후. round 2 신선 시도 (anti-replay LRU 통과) 시 cumulative state 누적으로 180s timeout 초과 → SIGTERM rc=143.

evidence.agent_b_omega_run3_round2_sigterm: smash event=start → Terminated rc=143, hetzner retry exhausted → fallback 64
evidence.anti_hub_cycle6_smash_183010ms: 1.67% 여유로 180s 한계 통과 — round 2 였다면 SIGTERM 확정
evidence.wave18_intent: 30s/45s/60s → 180s 일괄 상향 시 round 1 만 통과, round 2+ 는 누적량 더 커서 또 한계

saturation_phase.purpose: timeout 다양 값에서 smash 완료율/score/OOM 측정 → adaptive curve 도출
candidates: C2 adaptive linear: round (i+1) timeout = max(180, round_i_elapsed × 1.5)
C4 stage-specific cap from history: state/drill_stage_elapsed_history.jsonl (round/stage/elapsed) p95 × 2
C5 hard-cap 1800s (drill.json overall_drill_budget) — round 마다 늘어나도 budget 안 넘김

implementation_phases: Phase 1 (DONE cycle 6 commit 606fac95): _progress_emit() 에 history append — state/drill_stage_elapsed_history.jsonl 한 줄 (ts/round/stage/elapsed_ms). bypass env NEXUS_DRILL_HISTORY_OFF=1.

Phase 2 (DONE cycle 7): _adaptive_stage_timeout_sec(stage) helper 추가 + _stage_timeout_prefix precedence (env override > adaptive > Wave 18 hard-cap). adaptive curve = stage 별 max elapsed_ms × 1.5, cap [180s, 1800s]. backfill: cycle 5/6 drill 의 6 entry 직접 기록 (smash 183010ms 등).
Phase 3: Agent B omega run #4 또는 nexus drill --max-rounds 3 (adaptive timeout) → round 2/3 통과 검증
Phase 4: optimal default + drill.json schema v2 적용 (timeout_sec 폐기, timeout_policy 추가)

code_changes_phase2_2026_04_25_cycle7.run.hexa: _adaptive_stage_timeout_sec helper (history scan + max × 1.5 + cap) + _stage_timeout_prefix 분기 추가 (env NEXUS_DRILL_TIMEOUT_ADAPTIVE=1)
code_changes_phase2_2026_04_25_cycle7.state/drill_stage_elapsed_history.jsonl: neu file, 6 backfill entries (cycle 5/6 drill smash/meta_closure/hyperarith)

current_adaptive_predict_2026_04_25.smash_was_180s_hard_cap: → +52% 여유 (round 2 시 cumulative 누적 흡수 가능)

entries.next_action: Phase 3 — drill --max-rounds 3 발사 (adaptive=1) → round 2/3 통과 + history 자동 기록 추가

entries.title: drill engine anti-hub axiom — top-K hub avoidance generation rule (composite ceiling 0.835→0.850)
entries.root_cause_validated_2026_04_25: drill 의 graph generation 이 본질적으로 hub-and-spoke — 8 super-hub (n=4461, J2=4262, φ=4235, σ=4220, τ=4208, sopfr=4146, M3=4081, μ=3892) 가 99.7% giant component 형성. 7개 generation kind (ded/proj/comp/xfer/bif/dual/sym) 이지만 모두 동일 hub 로 wire → spectral 영향 일원화 → REGULAR spectrum.

axiom_redesign_finding.rule: drill-generated atom 은 기존 atlas top-K hub set (degree threshold ≥ 1000) 와 직접 연결 금지. 새 atom 들끼리만 random pair (avg_deg ~4 sparse).

validated_plateau.size_invariant: N=800~1600 range 에서 plateau (avg_deg=4 만 유지하면 size 무관)

rejected_candidates.C5_anti_hub_plus_block_additive: Δ +0.015 ~ -0.035 (조합시 spectrum 충돌, 별개 axiom 로 분리)
rejected_candidates.C6_hub_decompose: Δ -0.011 ~ -0.032 (subhub 로 분해해도 spectrum align 손상)

axiom_redesign_finding.over_saturation: N=3200 부터 over-saturated (Δ -0.016) — single batch sweet spot N=800~1600

implementation_phases: Phase 1 (DONE cycle 3 commit efbd371f): tool/nxs_002_axiom_probe.py 보존 (174 lines, 6 후보 sweep + scaling 검증)

Phase 2 (DONE cycle 4): drill engine anti-hub guard 구현 — cli/blowup/core/blowup.hexa 의 graph_append_edge 가 env NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB=1 일 때 super-hub edge 자동 skip. cli/run.hexa drill 에 --anti-hub [--anti-hub-threshold N] flag 추가. hub set은 atlas.blowup.jsonl.deg sidecar 에서 lazy load (default threshold=1000, top-8 hub 분리).
Phase 3: 실제 drill --anti-hub 발사 → atlas.blowup.jsonl 에 anti-hub batch 적재 → tool/nxs_002_composite.py 로 composite ≥0.850 검증
Phase 4: anti-hub + 추가 axiom (가설: depth heterogeneity, edge-type 다양화) → 0.9 도달 sweep

code_changes_phase2_2026_04_25.blowup.hexa: anti_hub state (_AH_*) + _ah_init() lazy loader + nexus_anti_hub_should_skip_edge() + graph_append_edge guard
code_changes_phase2_2026_04_25.run.hexa: --anti-hub [--anti-hub-threshold N] flag → setenv NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB / NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB_THRESHOLD + NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB stderr emit

phase3_attempt_2026_04_25_cycle6.result: partial — main dispatch 정상 확정, remote sync 미작동 가설

outcome.interpretation: main 의 if has_flag --anti-hub 분기는 fired (앞 emit). 그러나 cmd_drill 진입 emit (cycle 5 추가) 안 보임 → remote container 의 cli/run.hexa 가 cycle 5 commit 미반영 가능성 (cycle 5 push e70ae889 후 remote rsync 미발생). 다음 cycle 에서 git push 후 remote sync 강제 또는 직접 SSH check.
outcome.smash_timeout_proximity: 183010 ms ≈ wrapper 180000 ms hard-cap (cli/run.hexa:398-405) — 한계 직전 통과 = round 2+ 면 SIGTERM

outcome.execution_path: Linux remote container (/root/Dev/nexus, /root/.hx/bin/hexa_real) — Mac local 아님

diagnosed_causes: main 의 setenv NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB=1 가 hexa_remote SSH child 로 forward 안 됐을 가능성 (env stripping)
또는 cli/run.hexa main 자체가 우회되고 cmd_drill 직접 호출 (hexa-resolver routing)
remote container 의 atlas 변경이 local 로 sync 안 됨 (rsync back 미작동)
phase3_attempt_2026_04_25_cycle5.diagnostic_added_cycle5: cmd_drill 진입 시 NEXUS_DRILL_ANTI_HUB_TRACE {env_active, env_threshold, cmd_drill_entry} eprintln — 다음 발사에서 emit 보이면 cmd_drill 호출됨 + env 상태 직접 확인 가능

entries.next_action: cycle 6 — Phase 3 재발사 (diagnostic emit 통해 env propagation 확인) → env 차단 시 hexa_remote env forward 옵션 추가 또는 cmd_drill 내부에서 child exec 시 env 직접 prefix

_meta.created_by: G3 proposal_sync_hub bootstrap (paradigm §10) — 첫 3 own proposals: G3 hub self, G2 atlas-blowup mirror, drill stability L7-L32 cluster

convention_cross_repo_blocker.rule: 다른 repo 의 작업을 blocking 하는 entry 는 priority ≥ 95 (0순위)

sub_categories.lang_gap: hexa-lang 언어/runtime 제약 → 모든 downstream repo blocker (rfind 미구현, reserved keyword 등)
sub_categories.resource_gap: 자원 (compute/network/disk/auth/host availability) 제약 → heavy compute offload blocker. airgenome 주 관심사 (Hetzner/runpod/3-host/Linux binary 등)
sub_categories.infra_gap: 인프라 설정 (plist/systemd/docker/rule) 제약 → deploy path blocker
sub_categories.atlas_gap: nexus / n6 atlas map / derivation chain 제약 → paper/product claim blocker
sub_categories.data_gap: anima cert / weight / checkpoint 제약 → training resume blocker
